items.definition_en: An eyebrow is the line of hair above your eye.
items.example_en: She raised her eyebrow in surprise.

items.definition_en: An eyelash is one of the small hairs on the edge of your eyelid.
items.example_en: He has very long eyelashes.

items.definition_en: The chin is the part below your mouth.
items.example_en: She rested her chin on her hand.

items.definition_en: A lip is one of the two soft parts around your mouth.
items.example_en: His lips were dry after running.

items.definition_en: The forehead is the flat part above your eyes and below your hair.
items.example_en: She wiped sweat from her forehead.

items.definition_en: A cheek is the soft part on the side of your face below your eyes.
items.example_en: The baby has round cheeks.

items.definition_en: The jaw is the lower part of your face that moves when you eat.
items.example_en: He hurt his jaw while chewing.

items.definition_en: An ear is the part of your body used for hearing.
items.example_en: She has a small earring in her ear.

items.definition_en: A nose is the part of your face you use to smell and breathe.
items.example_en: His nose is cold.

items.definition_en: A mustache is hair that grows above the lip.
items.example_en: He grew a mustache last summer.

items.definition_en: A beard is hair that grows on a man’s chin and face.
items.example_en: His beard is very thick.

items.definition_en: A freckle is a small brown spot on the skin.
items.example_en: She has freckles on her cheeks.

items.definition_en: A pore is a tiny hole in your skin.
items.example_en: You can see the pores on your nose with a mirror.

items.definition_en: A mole is a small dark spot on the skin.
items.example_en: She has a mole above her lip.

items.definition_en: A dimple is a small dent in your cheek when you smile.
items.example_en: He has a cute dimple on his left cheek.

items.definition_en: A wrinkle is a small line on your skin caused by age.
items.example_en: She has a few wrinkles around her eyes.

items.definition_en: The face is the front part of your head.
items.example_en: She washed her face in the morning.

items.definition_en: The temple is the flat area on the side of your forehead.
items.example_en: He touched his temple lightly.

items.definition_en: A jawline is the shape made by your lower jaw.
items.example_en: He has a strong jawline.

items.definition_en: A sideburn is hair growing down the sides of the face in front of the ears.
items.example_en: He trimmed his sideburns regularly.
